primary_failure_drivers: Portland improved from 41.4% first-half shooting to 54.8% in the second half.
Portland generated 24 fourth-quarter points on 55.6% shooting with only one turnover.
Megan Gustafson scored 9 fourth-quarter points and made both of her fourth-quarter three-point attempts.
Portland produced 14 paint points and 5 second-chance points in the fourth quarter.
Connecticut committed five fourth-quarter turnovers, helping Portland sustain a comeback environment.
The game remained competitive late, preserving full offensive intent and comeback pressure rather than creating pace-killing garbage time.

process_evaluation.summary: The wager missed by only 0.5 points, but it was not purely bad variance. Portland's second-half efficiency and possession quality materially improved. The fourth quarter featured low turnovers, strong paint conversion, second-chance scoring, and sustained comeback urgency.
what_worked: The line was close to the final distribution and lost by the minimum non-push margin.
No chase or correlated add-on was recorded.
what_failed: The Under did not sufficiently price comeback-driven offensive persistence.
The analysis did not document a live score, game clock, or required remaining scoring rate at placement.
Portland's improved interior execution and reduced fourth-quarter turnover rate were not captured as invalidation signals.

timing_integrity_flag.details: The ticket displays a 09:42 AM timestamp, but the exact game clock and score when the wager was accepted were not supplied. Halftime-derived thresholds are included for diagnostic comparison only and must not be represented as confirmed placement context.

rules_added: Every live team-total wager must record score, period, game clock, current team total, and points required at placement.
Apply a comeback-persistence penalty to team-total Unders when the target team trails by 5-15 points and retains its primary creators.
Do not treat moderate first-half shooting as an automatic Under signal when second-half paint access is improving.
Downgrade team-total Unders when the opponent is generating live-ball turnovers or repeated empty possessions that create transition chances.
Fourth-quarter Under positions require a turnover-suppression check: if the target offense has stabilized ball security, reduce confidence.
A team-total Under must clear at least 2.5 projected points after game-state and foul-risk adjustments; otherwise pass.

confidence: HIGH on postgame diagnosis; LOW on reconstruction of pre-bet state
source_notes: William Hill wager screenshots supplied by user.
